title: Auto-save hook with debounce and async save handling
purpose: Provides automatic saving functionality with debouncing for content editors, tracking save state and last saved timestamp.
module_context: Exports a hook function useAutoSave that manages content change tracking, debounced save operations, and async error handling with cleanup.

methods.name: useAutoSave
methods.normalized_params: (content: string, onSave: (content: string) => Promise<void>, delay: number, key?: string | null): UseAutoSaveReturn

steps.content: Initialize state for tracking save status including saving state, last saved timestamp, and unsaved changes flag.
Set up refs to track original content, debounce timer, and component mount status.
Create a stable reference to the save callback to prevent effect re-runs.
Handle key changes to reset original content and clear pending save timers.
Define the save operation that executes the save callback and updates state on success or failure.
Watch for content changes and trigger debounced save operations.
Set up cleanup effects to clear timers and update mount status on unmount.
Return the current save status, last saved timestamp, and unsaved changes flag.
IF the component is not mounted, return early to prevent state updates.
Set the saving state to true before starting the save operation.
Execute the save callback with the provided content.
IF the component is still mounted after save, update the last saved timestamp and original content.
IF the component is still mounted after save, clear the unsaved changes flag.
IF the save operation fails, log the error but do not throw to allow consumer error handling.
Ensure the saving state is reset to false in the finally block.
